PEEPO

for the people who missed the moon,
they got another chance

wHY peepo?

Who doesn't love Peepo? The cute, wholesome descendant of Pepe is viral all across the internet, and for a reason, it is just IRRESISTIBLY ADORABLE!
Peepo believes in you, and your ability to HODL. We happen to believe in you too, and so we created a strong LP foundation, burned the LP tokens and renounced the contract, plus built a hilarious AI Twitter bot🤖 All so the community could thrive and one day be able to spend 69 Peepos for a juicebox in any local supermarket🧃
‍
Want to be part of this journey? grab some $PEEPO, and join us as we meme our dreams into reality together! 🐸💚
‍
Peepo army unite! up!

HOW TO BUY

 1. Create a wallet

  • Download Metamask or a wallet of choice from the app store or Google Play store for free. For Desktop users, download the Metamask.io extension for your browser of choice.

2. gET SOME ETH

  • With ETH in your wallet you will be able to swap for $PEEPO and join the army. If you don’t have any ETH, you can buy directly on metamask, transfer from another wallet, or buy on another exchange and send it to your wallet of choice.

3. sWAP ETH FOR $PEEPO!

  • Connect to Uniswap. Go to app.uniswap.org and connect your wallet. Paste the correct $PEEPO token address into Uniswap, select Peepo, and confirm. When Metamask prompts you for a wallet signature, sign.
  • Swap your $ETH for $PEEPO.
    We have ZERO taxes so you don’t need to worry about buying with a specific slippage, although you may need to use slippage during times of market volatility.

Join the $PEEPO  army.

WHERE THE FUN NEVER  STOPS! 

JOIN TELEGRAM

Step 1: BUY

Get your hands on some $Peepo and tell literally everyone you know about it.

STEP 2: HODL

Hold On to your $PEEPO for Dear Life. Never let go. $PEEPO is love, $PEEPO is life.

STEP 3: MEME

Have fun and vibe with the community, we are in this together. Laugh and share the $PEEPO love with others.

STEP 4: REPEAT

and let the fun never stop!

$peepo coin has no association with Matt Furie or his creation Pepe the Frog. This token is simply paying homage to a meme we all love and recognize. $PEEPO is a meme coin with no intrinsic value or expectation of financial return. There is no formal team or roadmap. the coin is completely useless and for entertainment purposes only.
